implementation_scope.source_type: fail-closed PersonaPlex Embry publish receipt gate

what_changed: UX Lab API now exposes /api/tau/personaplex/embry-receipt as a fail-closed gate over a required PersonaPlex Embry publish receipt.
The endpoint returns a structured tau.personaplex_embry_receipt_gate.v1 unavailable state with HTTP 404 when the required publish receipt is absent.
The gate preserves metadata from the existing Tau Embry Memory receipt, including REQUESTED_NO_PERSONAPLEX_RECEIPT, without enabling audio.
The Tau #tau chat capability area now renders the data-backed Embry Voice gate and reports FAIL-CLOSED until a real personaplex.publish_receipt.v1 with CACHE_REPLAY_PASS is attached.
The xterm pane label was corrected from a misleading TUI/TTY claim to Tau receipt terminal, with explicit text that it is not an interactive Textual TUI.

focused_ui_tests.command: cd /home/graham/workspace/experiments/pi-mono/packages/ux-lab && npx vitest run src/components/tau/TauChatView.test.ts src/components/tau/tauAgentHandoff.test.ts src/components/tau/tauPeerStatus.test.ts

visible_assertions: Audio activation is disabled until a personaplex.publish_receipt.v1 with CACHE_REPLAY_PASS is attached.

proves: The live Tau #tau surface exposes Embry PersonaPlex as a receipt-gated capability instead of a static UI label.
The UX Lab API fails closed when the required PersonaPlex Embry publish receipt is absent.
The rendered browser view visibly disables Embry audio activation and names the missing personaplex.publish_receipt.v1 / CACHE_REPLAY_PASS requirement.
The receipt-stream xterm pane is no longer labeled as the interactive TUI in the visible browser UI.
does_not_prove: Real-time voice input or output in Tau Chat.

next_stop_condition: Do not enable Embry voice controls beyond metadata mode until a real personaplex.publish_receipt.v1 with CACHE_REPLAY_PASS is attached and inspected.
